metadata.description: Ape Context — Enterprise context setup wizard for GitHub Copilot. Scans your project, discovers MCP servers, configures tools, distills team intent and constraints, and generates Copilot instructions. Works standalone or as a plugin for Git-Ape.

plugins.name: ape-context
plugins.description: Enterprise context setup wizard for GitHub Copilot. 10-phase onboarding aligned to the ISEE framework — detect, discover, distill intent, configure, and generate Copilot instructions for your team's toolchain.
